violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the kitchen and memory care dining room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, ice machines) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Items taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized, facility maintenance notified. Ice to be disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2025
Yogurt and fruit salad were observed with dates exceeding 7 days. PIC disposed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2025

The doors to the outside, located in the main kitchen and the memory-care dining room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2025

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the emergency supply closet. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -stand mixer -prep units. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2025

The floors in the dry storage area have an accumulation of soil residue, old rodent droppings and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024
Handwashing sink in the hallway prep area is lacking signage. A sign or poster must be posted notifying food employees of handwashing. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC moved to ware washing area to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024

Inspector observed dead mice on glue trap in back room on assisted living side. PIC removed from premises The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024

The non-food contact surfaces observed with debris: 1.beverage shelves observed with debris and rust. 2.cookline shelves in Al & IL have food and other debris. 3.stoves and hoods have dust and/or other debris. 4.food storage shelves in AL & IL observed with food and debris New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024

The following physical facilities have an accumulation of debris: 1.ceilings in AL & IL back observed with black residue and/or other debris 2.floors and shelves in walk in cooler (AL side) observed with dirt, food, and other debris. 3.walls in (AL side) back storage room have black residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024

The (walls ) in the (AL back storage and ware washing ) area is in poor repair. Observed missing drywall. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as dressings) in the walk-in refrigerator (AL side). Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2023
The following was not in good repair: 1. AL Walk-in Freezer 2. AL cookline prep unit Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2023
Ceiling (in AL side) near ware-washing area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2024
Grout for floor tiles in ware-washing area (IS) is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2024
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2023

Tuna salad and Chicken salad were observed held at 48 and 51 degrees Fahrenheit respectively. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods were observed held at room temperature on a service cart during time of inspection. Per interview of PIC, food was made at 9 AM this morning. Foods were voluntarily disposed of during time of inspection. PIC was informed to cease this holding process, cold mediums required to keep TCS foods at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2023
Tartar sauce in AL side walk-in cooler was observed with a date mark surpassing 7 days. Food was voluntarily disposed of by the PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2023

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings located in the dry storage room (IS). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2023

The presence of small flies is not controlled as evidenced by live insects observed during time of inspection (AL). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2023

The following was not in good repair: 1. IS Walk-in Freezer 2. AL Walk-in Freezer 3. AL cookline prep unit (per PIC) Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2023
Light in IS kitchen (by cookline) was observed in poor repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2023

The fanguards in the walk-in cooler (AL) has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2023
Ceiling (in AL side) near ware-washing area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2024
Grout for floor tiles in ware-washing area (IS) is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2024
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2023

Raw animal foods (such as whole eggs and liquid eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as cooked chicken, produce, and sour cream) in the walk-in refrigerator, 2 door reach-in, and prep unit. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, immersion blender blade and food processor) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Equipment was cleaned and sanitized during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2023

Various foods were observed held at 44-61 degrees Fahrenheit in prep unit and 2 door reach-in. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods that were out of temperature control for an unknown amount of time were voluntarily disposed of by the PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2023

Hard boiled eggs, various cheeses, and deli meats were observed not marked with the date of preparation in cookline prep unit. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2023

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of PIC, pasta was placed hot in the cookline prep unit in containers greater than four inches deep. Food was temping at 46 degrees Fahrenheit. Food was voluntarily disposed of by the PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2023

The door to the outside, located in the Independent kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2023

The door to the outside, located in the AL kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2023

Cold units (prep unit [Ambient: 45 degrees Fahrenheit], and 2 door reach in refrigerator [Ambient 2 Door Reach- in: 47 degrees Fahrenheit]) were observed in poor repair. Equipment shall be in good repair and proper adjustment. Units taken out of service to hold potentially hazardous foods during time of inspection. Equipment must be repaired or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the shelves in walk-in cooler (AL side) and fans in 2 door reach-in have an accumulation of white residue, dust and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2023
Ceiling (in AL side) near ware-washing area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2024
Grout for floor tiles in ware-washing area (independent side) is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2024

The following areas have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris:1. floors underneath soda machine shelving2. walls by dishmachine (AL and independent side)3. fanguards in (walk-in coolers)4. walk-in freezer (ice accumulation)The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2023
Light in Independent side kitchen (by cookline) was observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2023
